steps.t: Edbrit is at Aculf's Camp in the Rushgore. You have helped deal with some of the newly-aggressive creatures in the Rushgore, and should return now to …
Edbrit saw a mysterious shadow fall from the sky far to the south-east, in the Brown Lands. You have decided to travel to the Brown Lands in search of…
Edbrit is standing by the corpse of a mighty beast in the Brown Lands. You have found the body of a massive beast, and should speak to Edbrit about it…
Nona is standing by the corpse of the fallen beast in the Brown Lands. Nona is waiting to speak with you.
